I think I had max a couple interventions and they were both comfort-related, meaning not necessary per se. My car took me through my neighborhood’s winding, hilly streets, got on the highway, navigated San Francisco’s weekend road mess, crossed the Bay Bridge, stopped at a supercharger, and then headed straight to my destination in Napa. text:
Important to note that what matters is the ability to refine rare earth elements (which are NOT actually meaningfully rare) and manufacture magnets for use in electric motors. 

People understandably tend to think that rare earth mineral deposits are what’s scarce, given the name. That is false. They’re everywhere.

As with lithium, what China has that others lack is the heavy industry of refining the minerals.

Judges are appointed. Members of Congress are elected at the district or state level. text: Twice as many credit cards are issued and active than the total number of government employees! Crazy.
embedded_text:
Credit Card Update!

The program to audit unused/unneeded credit cards has been expanded to 30 agencies. After 7 weeks, ~470k cards have been de-activated.

As a reminder, at the start of the audit, there were ~4.6M active cards/accounts, so still more work to do. https://t.co/G50NfsKeTm

text: Tesla self-driving will be far safer than human driving
embedded_text:
I thought Tesla was trying to kill me tonight.

AI was driving me in the fast lane at 79 m.p.h and all of a sudden it lunged across the yellow line.

Bernie, you crusty old commie, still screaming about "oligarchs" like it’s 1917 and you’re about to storm the Winter Palace—newsflash, comrade, the revolution ain’t coming, and neither is your Medicare for All wet dream! You’ve been in politics since before the invention of the goddamn internet, yet you’re still out here acting like a broke college kid who just read Marx for the first time. Those mittens at the inauguration? They didn’t make you look "relatable"—they made you look like you’re one bad day away from yelling at squirrels in a park for not sharing their nuts equally. Your "Fighting Oligarchy Tour" with AOC is a fucking clown show—36,000 people showed up in LA to hear you ramble about the 1%, but let’s be real, half of them were just there for the Neil Young set, and the other half thought it was a Coachella pre-party. You’re out here claiming Trump and Musk are "very nervous" about your little rallies—bitch, please! Trump’s too busy golfing and Musk’s too busy tweeting memes from Mars to give a single fuck about your geriatric ass. You’re not a threat; you’re a walking meme, a socialist Santa Claus who promises free shit but delivers nothing but the same tired speech you’ve been giving since the Vietnam War—speaking of which, you dodged that draft harder than you dodge a balanced budget. And let’s talk about your "democratic socialism" shtick—calling it a "Second Bill of Rights" doesn’t make it any less of a pipe dream. You admire the Nordic model so much, yet Denmark’s PM straight-up said, “We’re not socialist, dumbass, we’ve got a market economy!” You’re out here confusing social democracy with socialism like you confuse a rally crowd with people who actually give a shit. Your policies would tank the economy faster than a Wall Street bro on a cocaine bender—$1.4 trillion in foreign investment came from Trump’s policies, while your plans would have investors fleeing faster than your hairline did in the ‘80s. Bernie, you’re 83 years old, and you’ve been “fighting the system” longer than most of your supporters have been alive. Maybe it’s time to retire to a nice Vermont cabin, knit some more mittens, and stop pretending you’re the Che Guevara of Burlington. The only thing you’re overthrowing is the patience of anyone who’s had to listen to your whiny ass for the last four decades. embedded_text:
Young men should be angry. The long-term effect of taking Adderall and Ritalin over years is growth suppression. 

I don’t think many boys are told “take this pill, and the major side effect is you’ll be shorter.”

Terrible.
